hero.subtitle: Frontend Engineer
hero.bio1: Frontend engineer with <mark>3+ years</mark> working on real products — fintech and software factories, on projects that go from zero to complex evolving systems.
hero.bio2: I care about precise, performant, and visually refined interfaces — the kind of work where <mark>development and design meet closely</mark>. The web can solve problems and be memorable at the same time.
